    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    F

    filterByAuthor(User) - Method in class model.IssueManager
    Filters issues by a given author.
    filterByDateAfter(LocalDateTime) - Method in class model.IssueManager
    Filters issues created after specified date
    filterByDateBefore(LocalDateTime) - Method in class model.IssueManager
    Filters issues created before specified date
    filterByIdFragment(String) - Method in class model.IssueManager
    Filters issues starting with given id
    filterByPriority(Priority) - Method in class model.IssueManager
    Filters issues with given priority
    filterByStatus(BugStatus) - Method in class model.IssueManager
    Filters issues with given status
    filterByTag(String) - Method in class model.IssueManager
    Filters issues by a given tag.
    filterByTitle(String) - Method in class model.IssueManager
    Filters issues similar to given title
    FilterIssueServlet - Class in com.example.bugtracker50
    FilterIssueServlet handles POST requests to retrieve all issues as JSON.
    FilterIssueServlet() - Constructor for class com.example.bugtracker50.FilterIssueServlet
     
    findIssue(String) - Method in class model.IssueManager
    Finds an issue by its title.
    findIssue(UUID) - Method in class model.IssueManager
    Finds an issue by its unique identifier.
    findIssueByIdFragment(String) - Method in class model.IssueManager
    Finds an issue by a fragment of its ID string.
    fromCode(int) - Static method in enum class model.BugStatus
    Converts int to bug status option
    fullName - Variable in record class model.UserListRecord
    The field for the fullName record component.
    fullName() - Method in record class model.UserListRecord
    Returns the value of the fullName record component.
